info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to hurt
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SraTa ' iti kvacit pAWaH  ' dOrbalye SraTayet prayatnavizaye syAcCrATayet mokzaRe  yO tu SrATayati SraTatyapi ca vA RO SranTayet SranTati  sandarBe Sni vimocanArTavizaye SraTnatyaTa SranTate SETilye..' ( Slo. 101) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uduttamaM varuRa pASamasmadavADarmaM vi maDyamaM SraTAya' (aTarva0 783 318 469) ucCraTAya=ucCraTAna=UrDvamunmocaya pASaBedena kriyAyAmupasargaBedo'tihfdayaNgamaH uttamamUrDvaBAge sTitaM pASamucCraTAnetyAha aDoBAge sTitamavAcInamavaSraTAneti maDyamaM ca viSraTAneti
